findings.message: Hardcoded secret committed to source: `api_secret_key` has a literal default value `"super-secret-key-do-not-share"`. This secret is now in version control history and will be used as-is in any environment where APP_API_SECRET_KEY is not explicitly set, silently exposing real workloads to a known, public value.
findings.suggestion: Remove the default entirely and require the value to come from the environment: `api_secret_key: str` (no default). Pydantic-settings will raise a validation error at startup if the env var is absent, making misconfiguration loud rather than silent.

This secret is now in version control history and will be used as-is in any environment where APP_API_SECRET_KEY is not explicitly set, silently exposing real workloads to a known, public value.","suggestion":"Remove the default entirely and require the value to come from the environment: `api_secret_key: str` (no default). Pydantic-settings will raise a validation error at startup if the env var is absent, making misconfiguration loud rather than silent."}]
